title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 10th March 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Buy on the JV news but only with a long-term view; patience needed
recommendations.detail: He said one can buy Dixon, but only with a long-term view, not short-term. It is one of the largest producers of fast-moving electrical goods and an OEM for many leading brands, with good turnover and PLI advantage. Today's news: a JV with a Chinese company in which Dixon holds 74 percent to make display modules, with broking estimates of a roughly 1 percent profit-margin uplift.

recommendations.note: Dark-horse bet; hold if already bought, buy as a dark-horse bet if fresh
recommendations.detail: He repeatedly frames it as a dark-horse bet rather than a sure-shot winner. It showed decent working though profits fell a bit last quarter. If already bought, hold it; if buying fresh, buy it as a dark-horse bet.

recommendations.note: Rising crude is a big negative for paints; wait until crude cools
recommendations.detail: He said rising crude prices are a big negative for paint companies, so wait until crude cools before buying. New aggressive competition from Birla Opus and Jindals (from about 1.5 years back) means market share and leadership can shrink. A good sound company, but it will not create wealth like before and should give only steady returns, not the old glory.

recommendations.note: Resilient, flat result but rose; operators stronger in the counter
recommendations.detail: He said Cupid showed good strength and stayed resilient even in weak markets, near its 52-week high. The result was flat (not great) yet the stock rose, maybe on the bonus/equity action. He advised hold because operators are stronger in this counter; later he added it is a strong but speculative stock.

recommendations.note: Can add on dips; now an institutional stock that corrected from highs
recommendations.detail: He said one can add Eternal. It has become more of an institutional stock and is among the names that corrected from highs in this weakness. He noted competition with Swiggy, Blinkit and Instamart before the caller's audio froze.
